name: Dental Practices
tagline: Practices with patients but no front door online.
display_description: Finds dental practices near you with steady reviews and no website. New patients pick a dentist online and book online — a practice with no site and no scheduling link never makes the short list, no matter how good the chair-side work is.
outreach_voice_brief: Write to a dentist who built the practice on referrals. Use the real signal — steady reviews, no website. Make the point that a new patient chooses a dentist online and wants to book online, and a practice with no site and no scheduling link gets skipped before the phone ever rings. Offer a simple site with online scheduling. Friendly, concrete, one ask. No marketing-speak.
